description: Game development workflow hooks for design, engineering, QA, and release.

PreToolUse.description: Warn if design-related changes happen without a matching documentation touchpoint.
Warn when engine-specific work is attempted without an active Unity, Unreal, or Godot profile.
Flag high-risk scene, level, map, or mission-structure edits that need validation.
Warn when prefab, Blueprint, or node-heavy files are touched without ownership or review context.
Warn when likely performance-sensitive systems or content are modified.
Warn when large or risky asset categories are introduced or modified.

PostToolUse.description: Capture build, test, export, or packaging context for later release debugging.
Capture playtest note structure when playtest-related docs are edited.
Capture crash-log and stack-trace metadata when crash evidence appears in the workflow.

Stop.description: Write a structured session summary with decisions, risks, and follow-up items.
